title: Eimidi lo aingito
description: Eyapie aingito. Ido ejai totokosi akwap keda eimidi. Nginitunganan eutai ainang ngesi, aitam aijaikin ngesi aijar najokan.

pages.text: Apaarasia aongon bon kanu alosit aingito, eyapiete aingito, apotu eimidi loka Ma's kiyatakinos noi
Abu eong esub imaten lu isinyikokit, abu ngesi kowo ekosio lo isinyikokit. Konye mam aberu naka aingito abu kojalak sio.
Abu papa kipikak egoe loemwanar mama ejai Ma.
Abu ngesi kikam itimake, abu ngesi koinak ngesi inyamat luka idweke, naarai...
Karaida apotu aiwadikaeta keda aisisia kilelebunoto aparasia ngun, atipet ido kopol noi, abu adeka naka Ma's fever kowolio noi!

Abu Bhaiya kosiom atutubena kotoma oitabon.
Abu ngesi kiner nuikamunitos aibwo kwape losodit, Ma, mam kereka ngin einakinit jo aiyalama?

Mam ekuriaka, abu eong ebala, Euta eong alosit kwape clown. Alimonokin akiro nueyalamasi itoni ne aburokinor aimurimuria naka Ma's.
Naarai...

Emamei idiotunganan epedori aipejokin itunganan arai idunyet arai epapero, Arai emina eimidi loka Ma.
Eyangaununei akimian naemamei angetakin.
Kawasia abu aparan naka aingito kodolu. Abu mama eong ekwenyun ejok ido kojaasi keda agogongu, mam bobo amwanis, mam bobo aiyalongong.
Abu totoka kodum edigurike loka BA
